title: No Budget, No Pay Act
stage_label: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs.
subjects: Government employee pay, benefits, personnel management
crs_summary: No Budget, No Pay Act This bill prohibits Members of Congress from being paid in a fiscal year until both chambers approve the budget resolution and pass all regular appropriations bills for that fiscal year. Retroactive pay is prohibited for such a period. This bill takes effect on September 29, 2027.
last_action_text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs.
